dimensional.core_objective: Systematically increase net new active users while improving cohort-based retention and conversion efficiency.
dimensional.success_criteria: 3-month lift in 30-day active user count by ≥15%, with ≥70% Day-7 retention for new signups and ≥25% conversion from trial to paid.

dimensions.name: Acquisition Optimization
subtasks: Audit current traffic sources and CAC per channel
A/B test landing page variants for conversion lift
Refine targeting criteria for paid campaigns (Estimated: 4h)

dimensions.name: Activation & Onboarding
subtasks: Map and instrument key activation events (e.g., first task completion)
Deploy progressive onboarding nudges for low-engagement cohorts
Run usability test on signup-to-first-value flow (Estimated: 5h)

dimensions.name: Retention & Re-engagement
subtasks: Segment users by engagement tier and churn risk
Launch automated email/SMS re-engagement sequences
Introduce win-back incentive for lapsed users (Estimated: 4h)

dimensional.core_objective: Produce a synchronized, capacity-aware 4-week content calendar that aligns themes, channels, deadlines, and stakeholder inputs.
dimensional.success_criteria: Within 3 months: 100% of weekly calendars published by Friday EOD, <2 reschedules/week, and ≥90% stakeholder sign-off before Monday morning.

dimensions.name: Theme & Timing
subtasks: Map quarterly themes to weekly focus areas
Assign publish dates per channel (web/email/social)
Block seasonal/holiday windows (Estimated: 1.5h)

dimensions.name: Asset & Capacity
subtasks: Confirm content asset readiness per slot
Match writer/editor capacity to weekly load
Flag bottlenecks for ops escalation (Estimated: 1h)

dimensions.name: Review & Sync
subtasks: Schedule cross-functional review slots
Collect stakeholder feedback by deadline
Finalize and distribute calendar PDF (Estimated: 0.75h)

dimensional.core_objective: Design a statistically sound, operationally executable A/B test that isolates causal impact on a defined primary metric.
dimensional.success_criteria: Within 3 months: at least one A/B test launched with pre-registered hypothesis, power-calculated sample size, validated randomization, and guardrail monitoring in place.

dimensions.name: Hypothesis & Metrics
subtasks: Define primary success metric and directional hypothesis
Select 2–3 guardrail metrics to detect unintended side effects
Specify minimum detectable effect (MDE) based on business impact

dimensions.name: Statistical Design
subtasks: Calculate required sample size and test duration using baseline rate and MDE
Set significance level (α) and statistical power (1−β)
Document assumptions (e.g., variance, seasonality, dropout rate)

dimensions.name: Operational Setup
subtasks: Define user segmentation and randomization unit (e.g., user ID, session)
Map variant assignment logic and ensure consistency across systems
Configure logging and metric collection pipelines (Estimated: 4h)
